name: worldarchitect
description: Local-first fiction worldbuilding app with an optional multi-agent AI system.

scripts.dev: npm run db:up && concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run db:up && npm run dev -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.test: npm run db:up && npm run test:postgres -w server && npm test -w server && npm test -w client
